brandDescription: A decentralized governance platform for the Cardano ecosystem that enables community-driven decision making through transparent voting and proposal systems. This platform empowers community members to submit, review, and vote on proposals that shape the future of the Cardano blockchain.
termsOfService: By participating in Catalyst Community, you agree to follow our community guidelines and respect all participants. Proposals must align with Cardano's mission and values. All participants must conduct themselves professionally and contribute constructively to the governance process.
privacyPolicy: We collect minimal data necessary for governance participation. Your voting preferences and proposal submissions are stored securely and used only for governance purposes. We do not share personal information with third parties without consent.
welcomeMessage: Welcome to Catalyst Community! Here you can submit proposals, vote on community initiatives, and help shape the future of Cardano. Your participation is crucial for the success of our decentralized governance system.
proposalSubmissionSuccessMessage: Your proposal has been successfully submitted and is now under review. You will be notified of its status and any feedback from the community.
votingReminderMessage: Don't forget to vote on the current proposals! Your voice matters in shaping our community's future. Voting closes soon.
